free_text: Measurement of the Integral Capture and Fission Cross
CFRF neutron spectrum is similar to that in a fast
saturation reaction rates (RR) are determined as RR =
(A D)/(b e N gamma delta), where A is the measured
peak area, b is the gamma-ray branching ratio, e is
detector efficiency, N number of atoms per isotope of
interest in the sample, gamma is the fission yield, D
is a decay/count factor and delta includes correction
Peak area determinations were made with
the GAUSS-V computer program. Peak efficiencies were
interpolated values based on the previously measured
source to detector distance 25 cm for times between
